- Hero Carousel
- Products Catalog
- Blog Posts
- Categories (hierarchical)
- Grower Profiles

### 🚀 What's Next (Phases 7-12)

**Phase 7**: Inventory Management (3 hours) 🔴 HIGH PRIORITY  
**Phase 8**: Customer Reviews System (2 hours)  
**Phase 9**: Product Variants & Bundles (3 hours)  
**Phase 10**: Order Management CMS (4 hours) 🔴 HIGH PRIORITY  
**Phase 11**: Marketing Tools (3 hours)  
**Phase 12**: Analytics Dashboard (2 hours)  

**Total Remaining**: ~17 hours to complete all phases

## 🚀 Quick Start

### To Continue Development:

1. **Read the Master Plan**  
   Open [`SANITY_CMS_MASTER_PLAN.md`](./SANITY_CMS_MASTER_PLAN.md)

2. **Pick Your Phase**  
   Start with Phase 7 (Inventory) or Phase 8 (Reviews)

3. **Follow the Steps**  
   Each phase has detailed implementation steps

4. **Test Real-Time Updates**  
   Make changes in Sanity Studio → See updates in 1-2 seconds

5. **Track Your Progress**  
   Update the master plan document as you go

## ⚠️ **IMPORTANT - READ THIS**

### If You Need Product/Category Setup:

The master plan assumes you already have products and categories in Sanity.

**If you don't have data yet:**

1. **Open Sanity Studio**: https://mash-ecommerce.sanity.studio
2. **Add Sample Products**:
   - Click "Product" → "+ Create"
   - Fill in name, price, category, stock
   - Mark 5-10 as "Featured" (for homepage)
   - Upload images (optional - add later)
3. **Add Categories**:
   - Click "Product Category" → "+ Create"
   - Create 3-5 categories (Fresh, Dried, Bundles, etc.)
4. **Test Homepage**:
   - Open http://localhost:3000
   - Featured products should appear!

**Then proceed to Phase 7** in the master plan to add inventory features.

---

### ⚡ **Option 1: COPY/PASTE (NO IMAGES!) - 30-40 min** ⭐ **EASIEST!**
👉 **Open:** [`COPY_PASTE_PRODUCTS_NO_IMAGES.md`](./COPY_PASTE_PRODUCTS_NO_IMAGES.md) 🔥 **NEW!**

**What You'll Get:**
- 30 products - **JUST COPY/PASTE TEXT!** (no images needed!)
- 12 categories (main + subcategories)
- 10 featured products for homepage
- 13 products with promotions
- **SKIP ALL IMAGES** - add them later when you have them!
- **Result:** Homepage works immediately! You'll add images later! 🚀

### 🎯 **Option 2: COMPLETE GUIDE (With Images - 60-90 min)**
👉 **Open:** [`COMPLETE_SANITY_DATA_GUIDE.md`](./COMPLETE_SANITY_DATA_GUIDE.md)

**What You'll Get:**
- 30+ products with FULL details (all fields + images)
- 12+ categories (hierarchical with subcategories!)
- 10 featured products for homepage
- Products with promotions (percentage & fixed discounts)
- Product gallery support (multiple images)
- SKU codes, stock management, weight/units
- **Result:** Professional e-commerce catalog! 🎉

### ⚡ **Option 3: Quick Start (30 min)**
👉 **Open:** [`KENNETH_QUICK_START.md`](./KENNETH_QUICK_START.md)

**What You'll Get:**
- 10 essential products (faster setup)
- 6 basic categories
- 8 featured products for homepage
- **Result:** Homepage works immediately! 🚀

### 📋 **Option 4: Original Guide (45 min)**
👉 **Open:** [`BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md`](./BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md)

**What You'll Get:**
- 20 products with good details
- 6 categories
- 10 featured products
- **Result:** Balanced approach! ⚖️

## 🐛 Common Issues & Solutions

### Issue: "No featured products available yet"
**Solution:** Follow [`BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md`](./BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md)

### Issue: Shop page empty
**Solution:** Add products in Sanity Studio (see guide above)

### Issue: Console 404 errors
**Solution:** See [`API_ERROR_FIXES_COMPLETE.md`](./API_ERROR_FIXES_COMPLETE.md) - These are expected and suppressed

## 🎉 Success Checklist

Your site is ready when:
- [ ] 20+ products in Sanity Studio
- [ ] 8+ products marked as "Featured"
- [ ] Homepage shows featured products carousel
- [ ] Shop page displays all products
- [ ] Category filters work correctly
- [ ] Product detail pages load properly
